action: Do NOT buy. Warn user immediately.

userImpact: Infinite dilution, price dump to zero
action: Avoid. Owner can devalue all holdings instantly.

description: Owner can block specific addresses from selling
userImpact: Selective rug pull — you may be unable to sell
action: High risk. Owner can freeze your tokens.

description: Contract logic can be changed at any time via upgradeable proxy
userImpact: Rules can change without notice — any function could be modified
action: Verify the proxy admin. If not renounced or behind timelock, treat as risky.

userImpact: Significant loss on every sell transaction
action: Warn user of the exact tax percentage before buying.

userImpact: Owner could change fees, pause trading, or modify contract behavior
action: Not automatically bad (many legit projects retain ownership), but note it.

description: Liquidity pool tokens are not locked
userImpact: Deployer can remove liquidity at any time (rug pull)
action: Check if LP is locked on a locker like PinkLock or Team.Finance.
Inform user of the buy tax percentage.

description: Contract source code not verified on block explorer
action: Note that the contract is unverified. Not a deal-breaker alone but adds uncertainty.

description: Owner can pause all token transfers
userImpact: Trading can be halted at any time
action: High risk unless it's a well-known project with legitimate pause mechanisms.

description: Contract makes external calls to untrusted addresses
userImpact: Behavior can change based on external contract state
action: Check what external contracts are called and whether they are verified.

userImpact: Contract can be permanently destroyed, making tokens worthless
